title: Portfolio XP
subtitle: A fully interactive Windows XP simulation reimagined as a design portfolio experience.
description: A fully interactive portfolio built inside a custom-coded Windows XP simulation. Designed to feel like a living OS, this project showcases my work through functional apps, retro UI, and immersive detail. Every element, from the boot screen to the file explorer, is crafted to reflect originality and precision.
bulletPoints: Fully navigable desktop with working XP-style programs
Built from scratch using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Emphasizes creative direction, technical execution, and detail-driven design

title: Highlight Reels
subtitle: Fast-paced edits capturing key moments, emotion, and story.
description: A collection of highlight reels designed to amplify big plays, emotional moments, and live energy. Formats range from music-driven edits to voiceover-led narratives, each tailored to the pace and feel of the sport.
bulletPoints: Built for hype, emotion, and impact
Edits tailored for each platform and audience

title: Game-Time Graphics
subtitle: Post-match visuals delivering results with clarity, emotion, and brand alignment.
description: A versatile suite of game time graphics designed for every stage of the match cycle. From pre-game lineups to final scores, each piece is built to inform, engage, and reinforce brand identity across platforms.
bulletPoints: Consistent framework tailored for pre and post-game use
Emphasis on clarity, team identity, and match context
Flexible layouts suited to a range of content types

title: Event Commissions
subtitle: Commissioned event videos spotlighting Australian sporting legends for charity luncheons.
description: Commissioned video packages created to introduce athletes at live events. These edits play in the lead-up to on-stage appearances, setting the tone, capturing attention, and creating a strong sense of occasion.
bulletPoints: Played during athlete walk-ons or live intros
Tone and pacing aligned with each event brief
Delivered in client-ready formats for live production

title: Creative Composites
subtitle: Photoshop-driven image manipulation and design exploration.
description: A collection of image-based design work built through Photoshop. This project explores compositing, retouching, and visual manipulation as tools to push style, technique, and creative direction across different subjects and formats.
bulletPoints: Designed to highlight individuality and presence
Adapts style to suit each player and moment

title: AI Experiments
subtitle: A personal deep dive into AI tools, used to test ideas, challenge habits, and expand creative range.
description: A mixed collection of AI-generated designs that sit outside defined projects. This space is used to explore style, technique, and creative direction through AI, without the constraints of a specific brief or category.
bulletPoints: Explores new styles, prompts, and workflows
Used to test ideas and push creative boundaries
